title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: SolarEdge Technologies Q2 2023 Earnings Results. Earnings Per Share (EPS): SolarEdge reported quarterly earnings of 2.62 per share, exceeding the analyst consensus estimate of 2.55. This represented a 2.75% earnings surprise and a significant year-over-year improvement from 0.95 per share in the prior year period. Revenue: The company generated quarterly revenues of 991.29 million, marginally surpassing the consensus estimate by 0.21%. This reflects robust growth compared to 727.77 million in the year-ago quarter. Performance Context: Management noted that the sustainability of the stock's immediate price movement based on the recently-released numbers and future earnings expectations will mostly depend on management's commentary on the earnings call. Stock Movement: Following the earnings announcement, SEDG stock gained 22.93%, reflecting investor enthusiasm for the beat results. Analyst Rating: The stock received a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating, suggesting expected performance in line with broader market movements.
